name: vendor.myndhyve.data-integration
description: MyndHyve data-integration pack. 7 nodes for fetching from typed data sources (REST / GraphQL / A2A / MCP), transforming results, applying bindings to UI templates, and managing run-scoped variables. Routes through ctx.dataIntegration.* host adapter.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Data Source: REST
nodes.description: Fetches structured data from a configured REST source. Higher-level than core.openwop.http.fetch — knows about the source's auth, pagination, response shape. Routes through ctx.dataIntegration.fetchRest.

nodes.label: Data Source: GraphQL
nodes.description: Queries a configured GraphQL endpoint. Returns `data` + `errors` per the GraphQL response shape.

nodes.label: Data Source: A2A
nodes.description: Queries a registered A2A peer agent per spec/v1/a2a-integration.md. Sends a typed task, awaits the peer's response.

nodes.label: Data Source: MCP
nodes.description: Fetches from an MCP resource OR invokes an MCP tool (host-defined which). Higher-level than core.openwop.mcp.{readResource, invokeTool} — knows the source's intent (data vs action).

nodes.label: Data Transform
nodes.description: Applies a host-defined transform expression (jq-style, JSONata, host-extension) to input data. Pure / cacheable / no side effects.

nodes.label: Data Variable Compute
nodes.description: Computes a derived run-scoped variable from existing variables + inputs. Pure / cacheable.

nodes.label: Data Variable Fetch
nodes.description: Reads a run-scoped variable by name. Side-effectful + cacheable (variables can change mid-run).
